subcodes.first_line: O ye who are related to that faithful servant of Baha, your noble father forsook homeland and dwelling, traversing plain and mountain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منتسبین آن بنده صادق بها پدر بزرگوار ترک اوطان و دیار نمود و در دشت و کهسار
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
